prompt: I just want to split my Node.js app into a shared lib and the main app in the same repo. Nothing fancy, maybe 2 packages. What's the simplest setup?
assertions: Recommends npm workspaces or pnpm workspaces (not a heavy orchestrator)
Does NOT recommend Bazel, Pants, Buck2, or Rush for 2 packages
Provides a minimal workspace config (package.json or pnpm-workspace.yaml)
Shows basic project structure with shared lib and app
Keeps the solution simple — no unnecessary tooling
